OUR PROCESS

OUR PROCESS

OUR PROCESS

Transforming raw conversations into strategic content assets that deepen LP relationships and drive deal flow.

Transforming raw conversations into strategic content assets that deepen LP relationships and drive deal flow.

Capture & Share

Upload your raw recordings on your preferred platform we distill them into narratives that resonate with LPs, GPs, and founders, spotlighting your edge in the market.

1

Strategic Editing

Think of it as a product sprint for content: cutting noise, sharpening insights, and packaging episodes with data-driven hooks and a consistent brand system.

2

Align & Iterate

Feedback loops run like portfolio reviews fast, structured, and outcome-driven to ensure every episode aligns with your investment thesis and brand authority.

Deploy & Scale

Your final deliverables become distribution-ready assets: LP-facing updates, founder-focused reels, and LinkedIn-native clips designed to drive inbound interest and expand your network.

The Framework Behind the Results

The Framework Behind the Results

Visibility drives outcomes. We turn your conversations into consistent, credibility-building content that wins LP trust, attracts users, and fuels growth.

Pre & Post Production

Pre & Post Production

We handle everything end-to-end — from guest research and coordination to advanced editing, pro audio, trailers, copywriting, design, and custom animations that make each episode stand out.

We’ve got the answers

We’ve got the answers

Why partner with Raw Canvas?

We’re not a traditional agency. We work as your podcast growth partner, helping VCs, founders, and SaaS brands turn conversations into visibility, deal flow, and authority. Every piece of content is designed with distribution and outcomes in mind from day one.
